final:
module RefModule(  
    input J,  
    input K,  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    output reg Q  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            Q <= 0;  
        end else begin  
            case ({J, K})  
                2'b00: Q <= Q;                    // No change  
                2'b01: Q <= 1'b0;                 // Reset  
                2'b10: Q <= 1'b1;                 // Set  
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;                   // Toggle  
            endcase  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
